notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 pf_passive publishes parallelogram geometry (r/z/width/height/shapeAngle1/shapeAngle2) for classic MAST structures but no resistivity. FreeGSNKE passive pickles require resistivity_ohm_m. Populate components ONLY with cited published values, e.g. {"vessel": {"resistivity_ohm_m": <cited>, "source": "EFIT/UDA/paper DOI"}}. Never invent ρ. Until then passive_coils.pickle stays empty and certify marks passive_resistivity_awaiting_authority (YELLOW). After population: rebuild machine_authority and compare Ip/flux residuals with vs without passives.
